GitHub-ready starter code

Run your mobile detailing business from one lightweight system.

Launch quickly with GitHub Pages + Formspree + Calendly + HubSpot (or Google Sheets). Everything below is editable and deployment-ready.

Request Quote Book Appointment
Call tel:(615) 348-7683 hello@example.com

System Stack

  • Hosting: GitHub Pages (free)
  • Frontend: HTML/CSS/JS
  • Lead form: Formspree / Google Forms
  • Booking: Calendly / Square
  • CRM: HubSpot / Google Sheets

Packages

Express Exterior

Foam wash, wheels, tire shine, window clean.

$89+

Interior Reset

Vacuum, plastics, vents, fabric spot treatment.

$139+

Complete Detail

Interior + exterior + paint protection sealant.

$249+

Lead Capture Form

This form is set up for Formspree. You can also replace it with a Google Form embed if you want a no-code intake option.

  1. Create a free Formspree form
  2. Paste endpoint in script.js
  3. Test by submitting a sample request

Address autocomplete loads from Google Places API to improve accuracy.

Booking System (Important)

Use Calendly for simple scheduling, or switch to Square if you need appointment payments.

Open Booking Calendar

Tip: Set travel buffers so appointments don't overlap by location.

Booking automation ideas

  • Instant confirmation email + SMS reminder
  • Collect vehicle size before appointment
  • Add no-show policy in booking description
  • Auto-create follow-up task in HubSpot

CRM Tracking

Track each customer through this pipeline:

New Lead Quoted Booked Completed Review/Upsell

Starter workflow

Form submission arrives by email, then add/update contact in HubSpot (or Google Sheets). Send booking link, complete job, and schedule a 30-day follow-up for repeat service.

GitHub Launch Checklist

  • Update settings in script.js
  • Commit + push to GitHub repository
  • Enable GitHub Pages in repository settings
  • Confirm form and booking links work on live site
  • Connect custom domain (optional)

© Jubilee-Luxury-Mobile-Detailing Co.

Optional upgrade later: Netlify for simpler forms and automation.
